comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: Removal pushed as Gerrit change 473 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/473). External collection confirmed clean (27 tests, no ref-lock); hermetic AC0 CAS coverage retained in tests/unit/.../test_ref_lock.py::test_ac0_blob_ref_roundtrips_through_remote. Awaiting votes.

compiled_state.description:
## Summary

`tests/external/test_ref_lock_ac0_live.py` pushes a throwaway `refs/reconciler/spike-*`
ref to the `origin` remote to prove the ref-lock round-trip "against the actual origin".
That assumes a **writable** `origin`. In this repo code lands via Gerrit and GitHub
`origin` is a **read-only mirror** — the external-integration Actions token is
`contents: read` and `github-actions[bot]` gets 403 on push. The test was added
2026-07-04 (after the last green run 2026-06-16) and has therefore **never passed** in
this workflow; it was masked by the ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS guard until that was fixed.

Its assumption (a writable non-ticket-branch remote) is invalid for this repo, so the
test should be removed. The hermetic counterpart
`tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/state/test_ref_lock.py::test_ac0_blob_ref_roundtrips_through_remote`
already proves the acquire/release/read CAS mechanics against a local bare remote, so
removing the live variant loses no real coverage.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Trigger the external-integration workflow (external job) on main.
2. Observe test_ref_lock_ac0_live fail: `git push ... origin refs/reconciler/spike-* -> exit 128`,
   `remote: Permission to navapbc/rebar.git denied to github-actions[bot]` / 403.

Expected: the external job is green.
Actual: the test fails because origin is not writable in this CI.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Delete tests/external/test_ref_lock_ac0_live.py.
- [ ] The hermetic unit test (test_ref_lock.py) remains and still covers the CAS mechanics.
- [ ] Verified end-to-end: the external-integration GitHub Action's external job runs green.
compiled_state.title: remove stale test_ref_lock_ac0_live: assumes a writable origin remote (invalid in a Gerrit/read-only-mirror repo)
